description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical aluminum can with a green and white color scheme, featuring a large central label with ornate borders and a crest illustration. The label includes bold, white text on a green background, surrounded by additional text in smaller fonts and a decorative ribbon motif. The top of the can is metallic silver with a standard pull tab opening. The lower portion of the can transitions from green to a darker shade, with subtle gradients and shadowing. The surface appears smooth and slightly reflective, typical of beverage cans. The overall design is clean, with a focus on traditional European beer aesthetics.
description: A tall, green and white aluminum beer can with a detailed label, metallic top, and pull tab opening. The design features ornate borders, a crest, and bold typography.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main label, crest, and bold white text on a green background.
description_view_1: Side view with the label wrapping around, revealing more of the background text and less of the crest.
description_view_2: Angled view highlighting the transition from the main label to the side, with the crest partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the label's edge and more of the background text, with the pull tab top still visible.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a green and white palette with ornate borders, a central crest illustration, and bold, sans-serif typography. Subtle gradients and background text add depth, while gold and black accents provide contrast.
